demographics.living_situation: lives alone in a private residence

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My chest is pounding so hard it hurts, I can't breathe, and my brain has completely frozen over these forms due tomorrow.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on tonight while I was trying to get important paperwork done before a morning deadline — my heart is racing, my chest hurts, and I can't calm down or think.

symptom_narrative.onset: this evening, while trying to force myself to start the forms that are due tomorrow morning
symptom_narrative.duration: a few hours and not settling
symptom_narrative.character: my chest is pounding and tight and it hurts, my heart is racing, I'm breathing fast and can't catch my breath, and my hands are shaking
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: it feels really intense — like my body has completely taken over and I can't switch it off
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: middle of my chest, and the tension is up in my neck and shoulders
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since it started tonight, worse the more I try to push through the paperwork
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing so far — I can't seem to bring it down
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: trying to sit down and actually start the forms makes the panic and the pounding worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: shaking hands, sweating, feeling completely mentally frozen and unable to organise the steps to fill anything in
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get like this when I have to deal with official or inaccessible systems, but not usually this physical
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm completely stuck — I can't complete the task and I can't rest either

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long-standing difficulty getting started on and finishing tasks, especially anything involving bureaucratic or inaccessible systems

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: 4 in the last 6 hours to try to force myself to focus

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I'm dealing with accommodation-related paperwork that I could lose vital support over if I don't get it in on time, and I already feel like I'm falling behind compared to everyone else who doesn't have these barriers. I've been putting it off for two weeks because dealing with these systems is so hard.

objective_data_offered.value: my heart is pounding really hard and racing
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's subjective sensation, no measured heart rate offered

objective_data_offered.value: my hands are shaking and I can't make them stop
I'm breathing really fast and I can't catch my breath
